title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
